description.ko: 디지털 공허 속에서 흑요석 구체가 무한한 기하학적 파편으로 산산조각 나는 카오스의 수학적 표현입니다.
description.en: A mathematical representation of chaos where an obsidian sphere shatters into infinite geometric fragments within a digital void.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Fractal Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A matte black geometric sphere suspended in a clinical #FFFFFF void, undergoing a recursive data collapse. The sphere's surface splits into millions of #808080 and #C0C0C0 micro-cubes that form a complex mathematical spiral. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, horizontal pixel sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slice through the fragments. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with digital scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of architectural entropy.
